title: dasispermum suffruticosum
intro: Dasispermum suffruticosum, also known as Dais, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant contains sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds that possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dasispermum suffruticosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and flatulence, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
